zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Astley於1215年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利時，他的父親Walter de Astley31歲，母親Isabel27歲。他於1245年與Joan de Bois在英國萊希斯特斯爾鮑頓 艾斯利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1265年8月4日在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Astley于1215年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利时，他的父亲Walter de Astley31岁，母亲Isabel27岁。他于1245年与Joan de Bois在英国萊希斯特斯爾鮑頓 艾斯利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1265年8月4日在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Astley was born in 1215, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Astley, was 31 and his mother, Isabel, was 27. He married Joan de Bois in 1245, in Broughton Astley, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 August 1265, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Astley est né en 1215, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Astley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Bois en 1245, à Broughton Astley, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 août 1265, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Joan de Bois nel 1245, nel Broughton Astley, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 agosto 1265, nel Evesham, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Astleyが1215年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで生まれた時，父Walter de Astleyは31歳，母Isabelは27歳であった。1245年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブロウトン アストリーでJoan de Boisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年8月4日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントウッドネスボロウスト. マリー ス バージン チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Astley: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루 스트. 메리 테 버긴 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Astley(이)가 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Astley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1245년 영국 레이스스터실르 브루그h턴 애스틀리에서 Joan de Bois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 8월 4일 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루 스트. 메리 테 버긴 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Astley nasceu em 1215, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter de Astley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Bois em 1245, em Broughton Astley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1265, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Astley: ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Astley родился в 1215 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Astley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Bois в 1245 г. в местности броугтон астли, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 августа 1265 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Astley nació en 1215, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter de Astley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joan de Bois en 1245, en Broughton Astley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1265, en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
